name: cloud-native-kubernetes
description: Cloud-native & Kubernetes team — 4 agents (kubernetes-architect, container-build-engineer, k8s-platform-operator, service-mesh-networking-engineer) for running workloads on Kubernetes well: workload design (Deployment/StatefulSet/Job, probes, requests/limits, PDBs, HPA/VPA), container build hygiene (minimal non-root images, distroless, multi-stage), platform ops (namespaces, RBAC, network policies, resource quotas, admission control, upgrades), and service-mesh networking (ingress/gateway, mTLS, traffic-splitting, observability). Cloud-agnostic. 4 skills, a decision-tree knowledge bank (workload-type + ingress trees + a dated 2026 ecosystem map), 12 best-practices, 4 templates, 4 commands, 1 advisory hook. Seams: managed control plane (AKS/EKS/GKE) -> azure/aws/gcp-cloud, GitOps reconcile -> devops-cicd, telemetry/SLOs -> observability-sre. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
